name: Churros Do Platano 9 Fored Plantains.
recipeInstructions:
If plantains are not available, use large green bananas.
For frying, use a mixture of olive oil and canola oil.
Peel and cut the bananas lengthwise. Cut each piece in half and dip in lemon juice.
To make the batter, beat the egg yolks until thick and light.
Add flour and salt to the yolks; mix well.
Beat the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
Fold the egg whites into the yolk mixture.
Drop the drained banana pieces into the batter one at a time using a slotted spoon.
Gently slide each piece into hot oil in a heavy skillet.
Cook over medium heat, turning almost immediately to prevent burning on both sides.
Drain on paper towels.
